# QA Plan: HP/Status Epic (Sprint 3 — Core layer; 2nd of 3-precedent battle-scoped Node form)

**Date**: 2026-05-02
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 8 stories across 1 system (HPStatusController battle-scoped Node + 4 payload classes + 5 .tres templates + 27 BalanceConstants)
**Engine**: Godot 4.6 (GDScript) — GdUnit4 v6.1.2 pinned
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-3.md` (S3-02 epic implementation; S3-01 epic + stories already done 2026-05-02)
**Epic File**: `production/epics/hp-status/EPIC.md`
**Governing ADRs**: ADR-0010 (Accepted 2026-04-30 delta #7) + ADR-0001 (`unit_died` + `unit_turn_started` signal contracts) + ADR-0004 (MapGrid DI for DEMORALIZED radius) + ADR-0006 (BalanceConstants for 27 tuning knobs) + ADR-0007 (HeroData reference) + ADR-0009 (UnitRole accessors + PASSIVE_TAG_BY_CLASS) + ADR-0012 (soft-coupled get_modified_stat + apply_damage Grid-Battle-sole-caller)
**Implementation order**: 001 → 002 → {003, 004, 005 in parallel after 002} → 006 → 007 → 008. Convergent /qa-plan + /code-review at each story; epic close-out after story-008.

---

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| 001 Module skeleton + 4 payloads + 27 BalanceConstants + 5 .tres + lint scaffold | Logic | New `tests/unit/core/hp_status_skeleton_test.gd` (≥6-8 structural tests) + ≥648 baseline regression maintained | Bash invocation of `lint_balance_entities_hp_status.sh` exit 0 |
| 002 initialize_unit + 3 read-only queries + CR-1a/CR-2 invariants | Logic | New `tests/unit/core/hp_status_initialize_unit_test.gd` (~6-8 tests covering AC-01/AC-02 + multi-unit + re-init) | None |
| 003 F-1 apply_damage + unit_died emit + R-1 mitigation | Logic | New `tests/unit/core/hp_status_apply_damage_test.gd` (~12-15 tests covering AC-03..06 + AC-17 emit + Verification §5 ordering + R-1 CONNECT_DEFERRED) | None (signal-spy capture verifies emit ordering) |
| 004 F-2 apply_heal + EXHAUSTED multiplier + overheal prevention | Logic | New `tests/unit/core/hp_status_apply_heal_test.gd` (~8-12 tests covering AC-07..10 + EC-08..10) | None |
| 005 apply_status + CR-5/CR-7 mutex + slot eviction + template load + .duplicate() | Logic | New `tests/unit/core/hp_status_apply_status_test.gd` (~12-15 tests covering AC-11/12/15/16 + EC-04/05/13/16 + shallow-vs-shared-tick_effect verification) | None |
| 006 _apply_turn_start_tick + F-3/F-4 + EXHAUSTED move-range + GameBus subscribe + MapGrid DI | Integration | New `tests/integration/core/hp_status_turn_start_tick_test.gd` (~18-22 tests covering AC-13/14/19 + EC-06/07/11/12/15) + new `tests/helpers/map_grid_stub.gd` | None (DI seam test isolation per ADR-0010 §13) |
| 007 _propagate_demoralized_radius + CR-8c + R-6 dual-invocation + EC-17 | Integration | New `tests/integration/core/hp_status_demoralized_propagation_test.gd` (~12-15 tests covering AC-17 full + AC-18 + EC-17 + R-3 assertion + R-6 dual-invocation) | None (test stubs override `_is_ally` / `_get_unit_coord`) |
| 008 Epic terminal — perf + 5 forbidden_patterns + CI wiring + cross-platform determinism + AC-20 + 3 TD entries | Config/Data | New `hp_status_perf_test.gd` (4 perf tests) + `hp_status_consumer_mutation_test.gd` (1 documented FAIL-STATE) + `hp_status_determinism_test.gd` (1 cross-platform fixture) + `hp_status_no_counter_attack_test.gd` (1 AC-20 stub) + 5 new bash lints in CI | Smoke evidence doc + 3 TD register entries |

**Aggregate test delta**: ~78-100 new tests across 8 new test files; baseline 648 → ~740 expected post-epic. ≤0 carried orthogonal failures preserved (S3-00 carry-fix already cleaned the prior `test_round_lifecycle_emit_order_two_units` discrepancy 2026-05-02).

**TR coverage**: 18/18 (TR-hp-status-001 through TR-hp-status-018 — TR-001 by ADR-0001 GameBus signal-contract source-of-truth; TR-002..018 by ADR-0010 explicit). 0 untraced.

**Same-patch obligations addressed via this plan**:
1. 27 BalanceConstants entries → story-001
2. 5 .tres status-effect templates → story-001
3. 5 forbidden_patterns lint scripts + CI wiring → story-008
4. `lint_balance_entities_hp_status.sh` validation lint → story-001 (script) + story-008 (CI wiring)
5. Cross-platform determinism deterministic-fixture → story-008

## Automated Tests Required

### Story 001 — Module skeleton + 4 payloads + 27 BalanceConstants + 5 .tres + lint scaffold (Logic)

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/core/hp_status_skeleton_test.gd` (NEW)
**Same-patch artifacts**: `assets/data/balance/balance_entities.json` (append 27 keys); `assets/data/status_effects/{poison,demoralized,defend_stance,inspired,exhausted}.tres` (5 NEW); `tools/ci/lint_balance_entities_hp_status.sh` (NEW)

**What to test** (TR-002 / TR-003 / TR-004 / TR-012):
- **AC-1 module form**: `class_name HPStatusController extends Node` (NOT extends RefCounted; NOT extends Resource; NOT autoload-registered)
- **AC-2 instance fields exact shape**: `var _state_by_unit: Dictionary[int, UnitHPState] = {}` AND `var _map_grid: MapGrid` (only 2 fields — guardrail)
- **AC-3 UnitHPState 6-field shape**: `class_name UnitHPState extends RefCounted` + 6 typed fields (unit_id: int / max_hp / current_hp / status_effects: Array[StatusEffect] / hero: HeroData / unit_class: int)
- **AC-4 StatusEffect 7 @export field shape**: `class_name StatusEffect extends Resource` + 7 @export typed fields (effect_id: StringName / effect_type / duration_type / remaining_turns / modifier_targets: Dictionary / tick_effect: TickEffect / source_unit_id)
- **AC-5 TickEffect 5 @export field shape**: `class_name TickEffect extends Resource` + 5 @export typed fields (damage_type / dot_hp_ratio: float / dot_flat / dot_min / dot_max_per_turn)
- **AC-6 5 .tres template existence + spec defaults**: load each template via `load(...) as StatusEffect`; assert non-null cast; effect_id matches filename; modifier_targets non-empty for buff/debuff effects per ADR-0010 §12 owner table; poison.tick_effect.dot_hp_ratio == 0.04; demoralized.modifier_targets[&"atk"] == -25; defend_stance.modifier_targets[&"atk"] == -40; inspired.modifier_targets[&"atk"] == +20; exhausted.modifier_targets is empty
- **AC-7 27 BalanceConstants present + values match spec defaults**: parse `balance_entities.json`; assert presence + ADR-0010 §12 default values for all 27 keys (MIN_DAMAGE / SHIELD_WALL_FLAT / HEAL_BASE / HEAL_HP_RATIO / HEAL_PER_USE_CAP / EXHAUSTED_HEAL_MULT / DOT_HP_RATIO / DOT_FLAT / DOT_MIN / DOT_MAX_PER_TURN / DEMORALIZED_ATK_REDUCTION / DEMORALIZED_RADIUS / DEMORALIZED_TURN_CAP / DEMORALIZED_RECOVERY_RADIUS / DEMORALIZED_DEFAULT_DURATION / DEFEND_STANCE_REDUCTION / DEFEND_STANCE_ATK_PENALTY / INSPIRED_ATK_BONUS / INSPIRED_DURATION / EXHAUSTED_MOVE_REDUCTION / EXHAUSTED_DEFAULT_DURATION / MODIFIER_FLOOR / MODIFIER_CEILING / MAX_STATUS_EFFECTS_PER_UNIT / ATK_CAP / DEF_CAP / POISON_DEFAULT_DURATION)
- **AC-8 8 public methods + 1 test seam stubbed exact signatures**: source-content scan via FileAccess.get_file_as_string + content.contains for 9 method signature literals; bodies are `pass` / `return 0` / `return false` / `return []`
- **AC-9 G-14 class cache resolution**: 4 new `.gd` class_name declarations resolve in `godot --headless --import --path .` post-write
- **AC-10 regression baseline**: ≥654 cases (648 baseline + ≥6 new) / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans

**Edge cases to cover**:
- 27 BalanceConstants safe-range bounds (lint script enforces; AC-7 asserts spec defaults)
- `.tres` parse failure (corrupted file) — graceful null-cast with push_error
- HeroData class_name resolution (depends on hero-database epic shipped 2026-05-01)
- Provenance comments format consistency (`// KEY owned by HP/Status...`)

**Estimated test count**: 6-8 new structural tests (~648 → ~654 baseline)

---

### Story 002 — initialize_unit + 3 read-only queries + CR-1a/CR-2 invariants (Logic)

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/core/hp_status_initialize_unit_test.gd` (NEW)

**What to test** (TR-005 partial / TR-018):
- **AC-1 (GDD AC-01)**: post-`initialize_unit(1, hero, INFANTRY)`, `get_current_hp(1)` returns `UnitRole.get_max_hp(hero, INFANTRY)` exactly (full HP per CR-1a)
- **AC-2 (GDD AC-02)**: 100 successive `get_current_hp(1)` queries all return max_hp (no drift; read-only contract)
- **AC-3 6-field UnitHPState population**: directly inspect `_controller._state_by_unit[1]`; verify all 6 fields populated correctly per ADR-0010 §3
- **AC-4 max_hp caching**: `get_max_hp(1)` called 1001 times all return same value (UnitRole one-time-per-battle cadence per ADR-0009 line 328)
- **AC-5 is_alive on init**: `is_alive(1) == true` immediately after initialize_unit
- **AC-6 unknown unit_id defense-in-depth**: `get_current_hp(99)` returns 0 + push_warning; `get_max_hp(99)` returns 0 + push_warning; `is_alive(99)` returns false (NO push_warning — canonical guard query)
- **AC-7 multiple-unit isolation**: 2+ units initialized with distinct heroes/classes → independent max_hp + current_hp; no cross-contamination
- **AC-8 re-initialization overwrites**: calling `initialize_unit(1, hero_b, CAVALRY)` after `initialize_unit(1, hero_a, INFANTRY)` overwrites silently (last-write-wins; Battle Preparation idempotency contract)
- **AC-9 regression baseline**: ≥660 cases (story-001 baseline ~654 + ≥6 new) / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Hero with min `base_hp_seed = 10` + INFANTRY → max_hp computed via UnitRole F-3 (test queries UnitRole.get_max_hp DIRECTLY for assertion; avoids hardcoded 106 number)
- unit_id collision across battle restarts (CR-1b non-persistence — story-002 doesn't test cross-battle since lifecycle is BattleScene-scoped per ADR-0002, but verifies in-battle re-init)
- 16-24 simultaneous units (MVP scale stress)
- `_state_by_unit.has(99) == false` post-init (only initialized unit_ids exist)

**Estimated test count**: 6-8 new tests (~654 → ~660 baseline)

---

### Story 003 — F-1 apply_damage 4-step pipeline + unit_died emit + R-1 mitigation (Logic)

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/core/hp_status_apply_damage_test.gd` (NEW)

**What to test** (TR-005 / TR-006 / TR-014):
- **AC-1 (GDD AC-03)**: Infantry + PHYSICAL=0 + resolved_damage=40; final_damage = 40 - 5 = 35 → HP 120 → 85
- **AC-2 (GDD AC-04)**: Infantry + MAGICAL=1 + resolved_damage=40; Shield Wall NOT applied → HP 120 → 80
- **AC-3 (GDD AC-05 / EC-01)**: PHYSICAL=0 + resolved_damage=3; max(MIN_DAMAGE=1, 3-5=-2) = 1 → HP -= 1
- **AC-4 (GDD AC-06)**: DEFEND_STANCE active + PHYSICAL + resolved_damage=20; int(floor(20 × (1 - 50/100.0))) = 10 → HP -= 10
- **AC-5 (EC-02)**: DEFEND_STANCE + PHYSICAL + resolved_damage=1; int(floor(1 × 0.5)) = 0 → max(MIN_DAMAGE=1, 0) = 1 → HP -= 1
- **AC-6 (GDD AC-17 emit-only)**: any unit at current_hp=10 + apply_damage(1, 10, 0, []); current_hp 10 → 0; GameBus.unit_died emitted with payload uid=1
- **AC-7 (Verification §5)**: signal subscriber captures `get_current_hp(uid)` from handler; assertion: captured value == 0 (post-mutation), proves emit ordering AFTER `current_hp = 0` assignment
- **AC-8 dead/unknown unit early-return**: `apply_damage(99, ...)` (no init) AND `apply_damage(1, ...)` on already-dead unit → push_warning + silent return; no signal emit; no state mutation
- **AC-9 non-Shield-Wall class skips Step 1**: CAVALRY (no passive_shield_wall) + PHYSICAL + resolved_damage=20 → full 20 damage applied
- **AC-10 EC-03 DEFEND_STANCE-first bind-order verification**: AC-5 path proves Step 2 BEFORE Step 3 (DEFEND_STANCE intermediate 0 promoted to 1 by MIN_DAMAGE floor)
- **AC-11 R-1 CONNECT_DEFERRED non-recursion**: subscriber connected with Object.CONNECT_DEFERRED runs in deferred frame (NOT synchronous) — verifiable via `await get_tree().process_frame` cycle drain pattern
- **AC-12 Commander stub call site**: Commander-class death → `_propagate_demoralized_radius(state)` invoked (story-007 fills body); non-Commander deaths skip the branch
- **AC-13 regression baseline**: ≥672 cases (story-002 baseline ~660 + ≥12 new) / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans

**Edge cases to cover**:
- DEFEND_STANCE × 100 successive damage calls — never reduces below MIN_DAMAGE (defense-in-depth)
- `apply_damage(unit_id, 0, ...)` (zero input) — ADR-0012 caller contract guarantees ≥1; HP/Status receives ≥1 only; test edge fixture passes 1 (boundary, not 0)
- `apply_damage(unit_id, 9999, ...)` (overflow input) — overkill discarded per CR-9b; HP clamped at 0
- All 5 attack_type values from ADR-0012 §C CR-1: PHYSICAL=0 + MAGICAL=1 only valid; test illegal value (e.g., 99) → push_error per ADR-0010 §5 line 199 spec
- CONNECT_DEFERRED contract: re-entrant `apply_damage` call from handler is queued, not stack-recursive

**Estimated test count**: 12-15 new tests (~660 → ~672 baseline)

---

### Story 004 — F-2 apply_heal 4-step pipeline + EXHAUSTED multiplier + overheal prevention (Logic)

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/core/hp_status_apply_heal_test.gd` (NEW)

**What to test** (TR-007):
- **AC-1 (GDD AC-07 input verification)**: Strategist + current_hp = max_hp - 56 + apply_heal(1, 26, 99); return 26; HP += 26
- **AC-2 (GDD AC-08 / EC-09)**: full-HP unit + apply_heal(1, 26, 99); return 0; current_hp unchanged
- **AC-3 (GDD AC-09)**: EXHAUSTED + current_hp = 50 (max_hp ~232) + apply_heal(1, 39, 99); int(max(1, floor(39 * 0.5))) = 19 → HP += 19
- **AC-4 (GDD AC-10 / CR-4b / EC-10)**: dead unit (current_hp=0) OR unknown unit_id → apply_heal returns 0; no state mutation; pipeline does NOT enter
- **AC-5 (EC-08)**: EXHAUSTED + raw_heal = 1; max(1, floor(1 * 0.5)) = max(1, 0) = 1 → HP += 1 (EXHAUSTED preserves minimum)
- **AC-6 overheal prevention**: current_hp = max_hp - 5 + raw_heal=100; min(100, 5) = 5 → HP exactly max_hp
- **AC-7 return value matches actual heal applied**: current_hp = 90, max_hp = 100, raw_heal = 50; return 10 (NOT 50)
- **AC-8 source_unit_id reflexivity**: identical behavior for source_unit_id ∈ {-1, 99, unit_id} (parameter NOT consumed in MVP)
- **AC-9 no-emit invariant**: source-file scan: zero `GameBus.*\.emit(` patterns in apply_heal body
- **AC-10 regression baseline**: ≥684 cases (story-003 baseline ~672 + ≥12 new) / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Float precision boundaries: `floor(39 * 0.5) = 19.0` → `int(19.0) = 19` (no precision drift)
- raw_heal = 0 input — ADR-0010 §7 allows; pipeline returns 0 (heal_amount = min(0, ...) = 0)
- raw_heal > HEAL_PER_USE_CAP (50) — story-004 does NOT enforce cap (the cap is in the F-2 derivation formula owned by caller, NOT in apply_heal pipeline; test verifies passive intake)
- Multiple successive heals in same turn — additive, no resource consumption (skill cooldown is caller's concern)

**Estimated test count**: 8-12 new tests (~672 → ~684 baseline)

---

### Story 005 — apply_status + CR-5/CR-7 mutex + slot eviction + template load + .duplicate() (Logic)

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/core/hp_status_apply_status_test.gd` (NEW)

**What to test** (TR-008 / TR-010):
- **AC-1 (GDD AC-11 / EC-16)**: POISON re-application (same effect_id, same source) → existing remaining_turns refreshed to template default; status_effects.size() unchanged at 1; source_unit_id overwritten on refresh
- **AC-2 CR-5d coexist**: POISON + DEMORALIZED active → status_effects.size() = 2; both effects independent; insertion order [POISON, DEMORALIZED]
- **AC-3 (GDD AC-12 / EC-04)**: 3 effects [POISON, DEMORALIZED, INSPIRED] at MAX cap + EXHAUSTED apply → POISON evicted via pop_front; final order [DEMORALIZED, INSPIRED, EXHAUSTED]; size stays at 3
- **AC-4 (GDD AC-15 CR-7)**: EXHAUSTED-active + apply_status(&"defend_stance") → return false; status_effects unchanged
- **AC-5 (GDD AC-16 / EC-13 CR-7)**: DEFEND_STANCE-active + apply_status(&"exhausted") → return true; DEFEND_STANCE force-removed BEFORE EXHAUSTED appended; final has EXHAUSTED but NOT DEFEND_STANCE
- **AC-6 template load null-on-missing**: apply_status(&"unknown_typo") → push_error fires; return false; status_effects unchanged
- **AC-7 dead/unknown unit early-return**: dead OR unknown → return false; no state mutation
- **AC-8 duration_override == -1 uses template default**: POISON template (remaining_turns=3); apply_status(..., -1, ...) → instance.remaining_turns == 3
- **AC-9 duration_override > 0 overrides + template unchanged**: apply_status(..., 5, ...) → instance.remaining_turns == 5; reload template asserts remaining_turns still 3
- **AC-10 shallow .duplicate() instance independence + tick_effect sharing**: 2 different units with POISON applied at different durations; instances independent (different remaining_turns); but tick_effect Resource SHARED reference (proves ADR-0010 §4 hot-reload behavior + delta-#7 Item 2 PASS)
- **AC-11 slot eviction does NOT trigger DoT tick**: POISON evicted via apply_status pop_front → no DoT processing in this turn
- **AC-12 CR-5b apply timing flexibility**: init → apply_damage → apply_status → apply_damage → apply_status (refresh) → final state correct
- **AC-13 regression baseline**: ≥696 cases (story-004 baseline ~684 + ≥12 new) / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Template `.tres` corrupted (malformed @export) — load may succeed with default values silently; mitigated via R-2 per-template fixture validation
- Source_unit_id = -1 (unsourced; scenario event) vs source_unit_id = unit_id (reflexive) vs source_unit_id = -2 (negative non-canonical) — all should be accepted
- duration_override = 0 — produces immediate-expiry effect (questionable design but valid per spec)
- effect_template_id with non-StringName lookalike strings — type system rejects at compile time
- `.duplicate()` semantics: Godot 4.x stable returns Resource of same class; tick_effect is null on non-DoT templates (verifies null preserved through duplicate)

**Estimated test count**: 12-15 new tests (~684 → ~696 baseline)

---

### Story 006 — _apply_turn_start_tick + F-3/F-4 + EXHAUSTED move-range + GameBus subscribe + MapGrid DI (Integration)

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/core/hp_status_turn_start_tick_test.gd` (NEW)
**Helper file**: `tests/helpers/map_grid_stub.gd` (NEW or reuse)

**What to test** (TR-005 / TR-008 / TR-009 / TR-013):
- **AC-1 GameBus subscription**: post-`add_child(_controller)`, `GameBus.unit_turn_started.is_connected(_controller._on_unit_turn_started) == true`; `_exit_tree` disconnects
- **AC-2 F-3 DoT 3-tick cumulative**: Infantry max_hp=232 + POISON applied 3 turns → 3 ticks of 12 = -36 cumulative
- **AC-3 F-3 bypasses F-1 intake**: Infantry + passive_shield_wall + DEFEND_STANCE + POISON → DoT applies directly to current_hp (NOT via F-1 4-step)
- **AC-4 (EC-06)**: POISON tick to current_hp = 0 → unit_died emitted; loop returns early
- **AC-5 reverse-index TURN_BASED decrement**: 3 effects [POISON 3, INSPIRED 2, EXHAUSTED 1] → tick → [POISON 2, INSPIRED 1] (EXHAUSTED expired); reverse-iter prevents skip
- **AC-6 ACTION_LOCKED DEFEND_STANCE expiry**: DEFEND_STANCE active + tick → DEFEND_STANCE removed (regardless of remaining_turns counter; SE-3 1-turn semantics per CR-13)
- **AC-7 (GDD AC-19) DEMORALIZED CONDITION_BASED recovery**: DEMORALIZED + ally hero stub at dist ≤ DEMORALIZED_RECOVERY_RADIUS=2 → DEMORALIZED removed; without ally → retained
- **AC-8 (GDD AC-13) F-4 sum + clamp**: DEMORALIZED(-25) + INSPIRED(+20) on atk; base=82 → max(1, int(floor(82 * 0.95))) = 77
- **AC-9 (GDD AC-14 / EC-11) F-4 cap clamp at floor**: DEMORALIZED(-25) + DEFEND_STANCE(-40) on atk; base=100 → clamp(-65, -50, +50) = -50; max(1, int(floor(100 * 0.5))) = 50
- **AC-10 (EC-12) F-4 dominance**: INSPIRED(+20) + DEFEND_STANCE(-40); base=100 → clamp(-20) → 80
- **AC-11 EXHAUSTED move-range special-case**: base=4 + EXHAUSTED → 4 - 1 = 3; base=1 + EXHAUSTED → max(1, 0) = 1 (floor protection)
- **AC-12 unknown stat_name**: get_modified_stat(1, &"foo_bar") → push_error + return 0
- **AC-13 DI seam direct call**: `_controller._apply_turn_start_tick(1)` works synchronously in tests
- **AC-14 (EC-07) POISON tick on current_hp=1**: dot_damage = 1 → max(0, 1-1) = 0; unit_died emitted
- **AC-15 regression baseline**: ≥715 cases (story-005 baseline ~696 + ≥18 new) / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Multiple DoT-bearing effects on same unit (POISON + future BURN) — each ticks independently; sequential current_hp mutation safe
- Status effect with `tick_effect == null` — skipped in DoT loop
- MAX_STATUS_EFFECTS_PER_UNIT = 3 enforced cap — only 3 effects iterate in tick loop
- EXHAUSTED applied THEN healed via apply_heal (already tested in story-004) THEN tick — heal multiplier and move-range branch independent
- DEMORALIZED CONDITION_BASED with ally hero EXACTLY at radius boundary (manhattan = 2) — boundary value correct (≤ inclusive)
- Empty status_effects array — tick is no-op (no DoT, no decrement, no expiry)
- EXHAUSTED on unit with no UnitRole-derived effective_move_range field → push_error (defensive)
- F-4 floor invariant: `max(1, ...)` — even with -50% modifier on base_stat=2, result == max(1, 1) == 1 (never zero; never negative)

**Estimated test count**: 18-22 new tests (~696 → ~715 baseline)

---

### Story 007 — _propagate_demoralized_radius + CR-8c Commander auto-trigger + R-6 dual-invocation + EC-17 (Integration)

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/core/hp_status_demoralized_propagation_test.gd` (NEW)

**What to test** (TR-011):
- **AC-1 R-3 _map_grid null assertion**: HPStatusController.new() without `_map_grid` injection → `_propagate_demoralized_radius` first line `assert(_map_grid != null, ...)` fires
- **AC-2 (GDD AC-18)**: Commander dies; ally A (dist=2) + ally B (dist=2) get DEMORALIZED; ally Far (dist=6) does NOT
- **AC-3 full integration via apply_damage Step 4**: Commander apply_damage to 0 → unit_died emit + propagation; allies receive DEMORALIZED with remaining_turns=4 + source_unit_id=commander_id
- **AC-4 R-6 DoT-kill dual-invocation**: Commander + POISON → tick brings HP to 0 → unit_died + `_propagate_demoralized_radius` invoked from DoT-kill branch (NOT from apply_damage Step 4)
- **AC-5 non-Commander death no propagation**: INFANTRY ally B dies → no DEMORALIZED applied to other units
- **AC-6 (EC-17) already-DEMORALIZED ally refresh**: ally A had DEMORALIZED remaining_turns=2; Commander dies → ally A refreshed to remaining_turns=4 (NOT stacked); source_unit_id updated to new commander
- **AC-7 enemy faction excluded**: enemy at dist=1 within radius but enemy faction → no DEMORALIZED
- **AC-8 dead ally excluded**: ally B at current_hp=0 within radius → skipped per `if state.current_hp == 0: continue`
- **AC-9 Commander itself excluded**: Commander's own unit_id skipped per `if unit_id == commander_state.unit_id: continue`
- **AC-10 is_morale_anchor DEFERRED comment**: source-file scan: `content.contains("is_morale_anchor branch DEFERRED post-MVP per OQ-2")`; NO `state.hero.is_morale_anchor` field access (would crash)
- **AC-11 no GameBus emit in propagation**: `_propagate_demoralized_radius` body has zero `GameBus.*\.emit(` patterns
- **AC-12 keys() snapshot iteration safety**: 3 allies in radius; inner loop apply_status mutates status_effects (Array append); all 3 allies processed; no skipped/doubled (delta-#7 Item 6 PASS)
- **AC-13 regression baseline**: ≥730 cases (story-006 baseline ~715 + ≥15 new) / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans

**Edge cases to cover**:
- 16-24 unit battle (MVP scale) — all units within radius receive DEMORALIZED in single propagation pass
- Commander dies adjacent to enemy Commander (dist=1) — only friendly allies receive DEMORALIZED (faction filter)
- Multiple Commanders die in same turn (rare; e.g., simultaneous AOE) — second propagation refreshes existing DEMORALIZED per CR-5c
- DEMORALIZED_RADIUS = 0 (configured edge value not in safe range, but defensive) — only Commander itself qualifies (excluded per AC-9); zero allies affected
- _is_ally returns false for null hero (defensive — should not happen in production)
- _get_unit_coord returns Vector2i(-1, -1) for unit not found in MapGrid (defensive — propagation skips that unit)

**Estimated test count**: 12-15 new tests (~715 → ~730 baseline)

---

### Story 008 — Epic terminal — perf + 5 forbidden_patterns + CI wiring + cross-platform determinism + AC-20 + 3 TD entries (Config/Data)

**Test files (4 NEW)**:
- `tests/unit/core/hp_status_perf_test.gd` (4 perf tests)
- `tests/unit/core/hp_status_consumer_mutation_test.gd` (1 documented FAIL-STATE)
- `tests/unit/core/hp_status_determinism_test.gd` (1 cross-platform fixture)
- `tests/unit/core/hp_status_no_counter_attack_test.gd` (1 AC-20 stub)

**Lint scripts (5 NEW)**:
- `tools/ci/lint_hp_status_static_var_state_addition.sh`
- `tools/ci/lint_hp_status_consumer_mutation.sh`
- `tools/ci/lint_hp_status_re_entrant_emit_without_deferred.sh`
- `tools/ci/lint_hp_status_signal_emission_outside_domain.sh`
- `tools/ci/lint_hp_status_external_state_mutation.sh`

**What to test** (TR-015 / TR-016 / TR-017):
- **AC-1 4 perf tests at gates**: apply_damage <0.15ms (3× over headline), get_modified_stat <1.25ms (25× generous per turn-order precedent), apply_status <1.0ms (10×), _apply_turn_start_tick <1.0ms (5×); each runs 1000 iterations
- **AC-2 static-var lint**: exit 0 only when `^static var` count == 0 in hp_status_controller.gd (R-4)
- **AC-3 consumer-mutation regression lint**: documented FAIL-STATE test exists with required `# DOCUMENTED FAIL-STATE` header (R-5)
- **AC-4 R-1 re-entrant emit lint**: AWK-based scan for `apply_damage` call within 5 lines after `GameBus.unit_died.emit(` — exit 0 if no synchronous re-entry pattern detected
- **AC-5 signal emission domain lint**: ≥2 `GameBus.unit_died.emit(` sites; zero foreign-domain emits (Validation §3 + §4)
- **AC-6 external state mutation lint**: zero non-test src/ files access `_state_by_unit` directly (R-5 extension)
- **AC-7 architecture.yaml +5 forbidden_patterns**: total grows from 17 → 22; each entry has pattern + description + source ADR + lint script path
- **AC-8 CI workflow wiring**: 5 new lint steps inserted between hero-database lints and damage-calc fgb_prov_removed lint
- **AC-9 (GDD AC-20)**: source-file scan: zero `counter_attack` references in hp_status_controller.gd; integration test verifies DEFEND_STANCE-active unit gets -50% damage AND no counter signal emitted from HP/Status side
- **AC-10 documented FAIL-STATE regression**: `effects[0].remaining_turns = 999; effects_v2[0].remaining_turns == 999` proves cross-call corruption visible (passing test that asserts the failure mode IS observable)
- **AC-11 cross-platform determinism**: 50-step synthetic battle scenario produces bit-identical final state on macOS/Linux/Windows (integer arithmetic + floor + clamp guarantees)
- **AC-12 3 TD entries**: TD-NNN coord_to_unit reverse cache (Polish-tier); TD-NNN+1 is_morale_anchor migration (post-MVP per OQ-2); TD-NNN+2 on-device perf benchmark
- **AC-13 regression baseline**: ≥740 cases (story-007 baseline ~730 + ≥10 new) / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Perf gates fail on slow CI runner — investigate cause; do NOT raise gates speculatively (defeats purpose)
- Determinism fixture baseline drift if UnitRole formulas change — test must be updated alongside (not silently accepted)
- Architecture.yaml YAML parse errors during append — sanity check via `python3 -c 'import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open("docs/registry/architecture.yaml"))'` post-edit
- CI workflow positional ordering bugs — verify lint step appears in correct sequence via grep line numbers

**Estimated test count**: 7 new tests (~730 → ~740 baseline) + 5 lint scripts (CI verification — not GdUnit4 tests)

## Manual QA Checklist

### Story 001 — Lint script invocation (Logic)

**Verification method**: bash invocation; spot-check lint output
**Who must sign off**: developer (self-verify); no external sign-off needed
**Evidence to capture**: stdout from `bash tools/ci/lint_balance_entities_hp_status.sh`

Checklist:
- [ ] `bash tools/ci/lint_balance_entities_hp_status.sh` exits 0 standalone
- [ ] Stdout reports "27/27 keys present, all within safe ranges"
- [ ] Negative-path: temporarily set `MIN_DAMAGE: 99` in JSON → script exits 1 with key + bound message; revert before commit

### Stories 002-007 — Automated test coverage only (Logic / Integration)

No manual verification required. All AC verified via automated tests + signal spy capture + DI seam stubs. Lean-mode orchestrator-direct /code-review at story close-out validates structural compliance.

- [ ] `architecture.yaml` forbidden_patterns count grew by 5 (verify via `grep -cE '^  - pattern: hp_status_'` returns 5)

- [ ] 3 TD entries appended to `docs/tech-debt-register.md` with full required fields
- [ ] Cross-platform determinism fixture baseline values stable (macOS-Metal known-good)

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for sprint-3 (post-hp-status):

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (reuse sprint-2 smoke baseline)
2. New game / new battle session can be started (sprint-2 baseline)
3. **HPStatusController spawned at battle-init** (Battle Preparation hook landing post-sprint-3 — for now, verify via test fixture only; production scene wiring blocked on Battle Preparation ADR)
4. **F-1 damage intake pipeline** correctly applies passive flat reduction + DEFEND_STANCE + MIN_DAMAGE floor (story-003 unit tests cover; full-stack verification deferred to Vertical Slice)
5. **F-2 healing pipeline** correctly applies EXHAUSTED multiplier + overheal prevention (story-004 tests cover)
6. **Status effect lifecycle**: apply / refresh / coexist / evict / mutex (story-005 tests cover)
7. **Turn-start DoT tick** correctly applies POISON DoT + duration decrement + DEFEND_STANCE expiry + DEMORALIZED recovery (story-006 tests cover)
8. **Death + DEMORALIZED radius propagation** (Commander class auto-trigger; CR-8c) (story-007 tests cover)
9. **Cross-platform determinism**: 50-step synthetic battle bit-identical (story-008 fixture)
10. Save / load cycle completes without data loss — HP/Status state is BATTLE-SCOPED (CR-1b) so it does NOT participate in save/load; verify save-manager regression remains green (no new SaveContext fields)
11. Performance is within budget on target hardware (no new frame spikes — story-008 perf gates verify; on-device deferred to Polish per TD-NNN+2)

*Smoke tests are verified by the developer via `/smoke-check`. Most hp-status verification is at the test-fixture level (Battle Preparation production scene wiring is post-MVP). Reference this list when running `/smoke-check sprint-3`.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| (none) | — | — | — |

**No playtest sessions required for the hp-status epic**. All 8 stories are Logic / Integration / Config-Data type with deterministic mathematical pipelines (F-1 / F-2 / F-3 / F-4) verified via automated tests. Visual/Feel ACs (HP bar 4-tier ink-wash treatment, status-effect sprite overlays, death visual sequence per GDD §Visual/Audio Requirements) are part of a future Battle HUD epic — playtest validation deferred to that epic.

**Future playtest deferrals** (logged for Battle HUD epic):
- HP-bar agency check: does the 4-tier ink-wash treatment communicate "ink thinning" emotional weight per Player Fantasy?
- Status-effect icon clarity: can players identify all 5 MVP status effects at 16×16px under 0.5s exposure?
- DEMORALIZED propagation tactical readability: does the 0.3s ink-crack VFX clearly show which units received the debuff?

## Definition of Done — HP/Status Epic (Sprint 3 S3-02)

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (lint script exit 0; test count assertions; structural source-file scans)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (8 new test files across stories 001-008; 4 helper test files in story-008)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for story-001 (lint invocation stdout) and story-008 (smoke evidence + TD register entries)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint-3` after story-008 close-out)
- [ ] No regressions introduced — full GdUnit4 suite at the baseline-grown count (648 → ~740 by epic terminal); 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans across all 8 story increments
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review at story-done time; lean-mode orchestrator-direct precedent stable at 5+ occurrences as of turn-order epic Complete 2026-05-02)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] EPIC.md Stories table row Status flipped Ready → Complete (per turn-order story-007 close-out precedent)

**Epic-level DoD additions**:

- [ ] All 18 TRs (TR-hp-status-001..018) status remains `active` in tr-registry.yaml
- [ ] 27 BalanceConstants present in `assets/data/balance/balance_entities.json` with provenance comments + lint exit 0
- [ ] 5 .tres status-effect templates at `assets/data/status_effects/`
- [ ] 5+ forbidden_patterns registered in `docs/registry/architecture.yaml` + CI lint scripts wired into `.github/workflows/tests.yml`
- [ ] DI test seam (`_apply_turn_start_tick` direct call + `_map_grid` constructor injection) verified in story-006 + story-007 tests
- [ ] Cross-platform determinism headless CI fixture passes (story-008 deterministic-fixture)
- [ ] Pattern boundary precedent stable at 3 ADRs (ADR-0005 InputRouter Autoload Node + ADR-0010 HPStatusController battle-scoped Node + ADR-0011 TurnOrderRunner battle-scoped Node)
- [ ] Layer status: Foundation 5/5 + Core **3/4** Complete (hp-status closes the 3rd Core slot; only grid-battle remains, which is currently classified Feature in some prose — verify at epic close-out)

---

## Test Infrastructure Notes (carried from prior epics)

- **GdUnit4 v6.1.2 lifecycle hooks**: `before_test()` (NOT `before_each`) per Godot 4.6 + GdUnit4 6.1+ canonical — refer to turn-order story-001 + hero-database story-001 precedents
- **G-14 import refresh**: after writing any new `.gd` class_name file, run `godot --headless --import --path .` BEFORE first test run; skipping costs ~2 min on parse-error debugging
- **G-15 reset discipline**: every HPStatusController test suite must reset `BalanceConstants._cache_loaded = false` per ADR-0006 §6 G-15 mirror; create fresh `HPStatusController.new()` per test (no static state — forbidden_pattern hp_status_static_var_state_addition lands in story-008)
- **G-10 GameBus subscription**: tests subscribing to GameBus signals (story-003 unit_died emit verification + story-006 unit_turn_started subscribe verification) use real `/root/GameBus` autoload (NOT GameBusStub) per turn-order story-003 lessons
- **G-4 lambda primitive-capture**: avoid via method-reference signal handlers (`func _on_unit_died_handler(uid: int) -> void: ...`); pattern stable per turn-order story-003 + 005
- **R-5 consumer-mutation FAIL-STATE regression**: documented test that PROVES the failure mode (NOT a passing protective test) per hero-database story-004 precedent — convention is sole defense
- **Polish-deferral pattern**: on-device perf benchmarks deferred to Polish-tier per damage-calc story-010 + hero-database story-005 + turn-order story-007 precedent (stable at 6+ invocations); reactivation triggers logged in TD entries

---

## Cross-System Risk Tracking

| Risk | Source | Mitigation in Plan |
|------|--------|---------------------|
| R-1 Re-entrant unit_died emission | ADR-0010 R-1 | Story-003 AC-11 CONNECT_DEFERRED test; story-008 lint enforces |
| R-2 StatusEffect template corruption / missing file | ADR-0010 R-2 | Story-001 AC-6 .tres existence + non-default field check |
| R-3 _map_grid null reference | ADR-0010 R-3 | Story-007 AC-1 assertion fires when DI not injected |
| R-4 Static-var test isolation hazard | ADR-0010 R-4 | Story-008 AC-2 `^static var` lint returns 0 |
| R-5 Consumer mutation of returned Array | ADR-0010 R-5 | Story-008 AC-3 + AC-10 documented FAIL-STATE regression |
| R-6 unit_died ordering with DEMORALIZED propagation | ADR-0010 R-6 | Story-007 AC-4 R-6 dual-invocation (apply_damage Step 4 + DoT-kill branch) |
| R-7 effect_template_id typo silent miss | ADR-0010 R-7 | Story-005 AC-6 push_error on unknown template |
